name: macros
description: Subagent orchestration workflows, active modes, and command shorthands: map-reduce, chunked (sequence a task as ordered parts that add up to the whole), packet (durable filesystem round trips), research-backed critique, consensus review, sequential passes, rigor mode, orchestrate (delegate-by-default mode), askme, delegate, tmi, dry-run, timeless, dredge (search prior chats), timestamp (prefix new files/folders with a date-CLI stamp), and new (scaffold a custom macro)
